_comment: Round-260 multi-locale fixtures for digital.vasic.agentic. Used by challenges/scripts/agentic_describe_challenge.sh and challenges/runner/main.go to verify the workflow engine round-trips non-ASCII content through every public surface: Workflow.AddNode/AddEdge/SetEntryPoint/AddEndNode/Execute/RestoreFromCheckpoint, NodeHandler/ConditionFunc/NodeInput/NodeOutput/WorkflowState/Checkpoint, ErrNodeHandlerNotConfigured. CONST-046 alignment: no hardcoded English-only assumption — every node name, prompt, and result string in the runner is sourced from these fixtures.

inputs.prompt: Analyze the diff for style violations.

inputs.plan_label: 計画: コードレビュー
inputs.execute_label: 実行: 静的解析を行う
inputs.review_label: レビュー: 結果を要約する
inputs.prompt: スタイル違反について差分を分析してください。
inputs.expected_result: 計画完了: 分析、実行、レビュー (ja)

inputs.execute_label: 执行: 运行静态分析
inputs.prompt: 分析差异以查找样式违规。
inputs.expected_result: 计划完成: 分析、执行、审查 (zh-CN)
